name: Kodi Kura

ingredients.name: 2 tbsp grated coconut, ground to paste

steps: Saute onions in oil until deep golden, then add ginger garlic paste and curry leaves.
Add tomatoes, turmeric, chilli powder and coriander powder and cook to a glossy masala.
Add the chicken and salt, and sear on high heat until the masala clings to every piece.
Add the coconut paste with a cup of hot water, cover and simmer until the chicken is tender.
Finish with garam masala and simmer until the oil floats on the gravy; serve with rice or roti.
